title: No First-Person Potion Particles
description: Hides potion particles coming from you in first person
body:
Do you ever use a beacon in your Minecraft base but are really annoyed by the constant potion particles?

This mod aims to make things a little less annoying!

Heavily inspired by CleanView, this mod lets you disable potion particles that come from yourself, but also let you choose to show them when you are in third person (using modmenu).
